title: Social hotel search engine
body:
The tourism industry (travel, hotels, etc.) is one of the most popular sectors online. We often search for and research our destination and book transportation and accommodations using the countless tools and services available on the internet.

Tralopia is a project that recently launched in its beta phase; it is a social hotel search engine that helps us find our ideal hotel based on our preferences (leisure and business) and uses social media platforms like Facebook and Twitter to determine our tastes.

**For this project, I created both the brand identity and the user interface (UI), and, in this case, I also developed the prototype (DHTML, PHP, jQuery)**

[http://www.tralopia.com](http://www.tralopia.com/invite/190)
